zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Griffin於大約1605年出生在英國米德萊可時，他的父親Hugh Griffin24歲，母親Karen Wall20歲。他於1634年與Elizabeth在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1662年9月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年58歲。

zh-hans.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts, British C: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Griffin于大约1605年出生在英国米德萊可时，他的父亲Hugh Griffin24岁，母亲Karen Wall20岁。他于1634年与Elizabeth在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1662年9月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Griffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gruffin, Griffin, a pet form of Middle Welsh Gruffudd. In the Welsh border counties this name was introduced directly from Welsh, and in the eastern counties of England by Bretons from France who came over with the Norman conquest.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha ‘descendant of Gríobhtha’, a personal name from gríobh ‘gryphon’.

variants.name: Griffee
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffy
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffey
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

variants.name: Humphry

Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Griffin was born about 1605, in Middlesex, England, his father, Hugh Griffin, was 24 and his mother, Karen Wall, was 20. He married Elizabeth in 1634, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 September 1662, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 58.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Griffinが約1605年にイギリスミッドレセックスで生まれた時，父Hugh Griffinは24歳，母Karen Wallは20歳であった。1634年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1662年9月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Griffin(이)가 대략 1605년 영국 미들레세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Griffin(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Karen Wall(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1634년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1662년 9월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Griffin nasceu aproximadamente 1605, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Griffin, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Karen Wall, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth em 1634, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de setembro de 1662, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Griffin родился около 1605 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Griffin было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Karen Wall, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth в 1634 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 сентября 1662 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Griffin nació aproximadamente 1605, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Griffin, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Karen Wall, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth en 1634, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de septiembre de 1662, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 58 años.
